query:
UPDATE user_yunzhanghu_profiles
            SET sign_status = $2,
                sign_url = CASE
                    WHEN $2 = 'signing' THEN COALESCE($3, sign_url)
                    ELSE NULL
                END,
                sign_nonce = CASE
                    WHEN $2 = 'signing' THEN COALESCE($4, sign_nonce)
                    ELSE NULL
                END,
                signed_at = $5,
                terminated_at = $6,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE user_id = $1
